channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Kash Patel's 'BasedApparel' website is apparently hosting ClickFix malware
item.description: The malware targets macOS users only and serves commodity infostealers.

item.title: SpaceX reportedly pressured the Pentagon into paying more for Starlink access
item.description: SpaceX is reportedly jacking up Starlink prices for the Pentagon.

item.title: What is the release date for Hacks season 5 episode 10 on HBO Max?
item.description: Brace yourself: Deborah and Ava are heading to the small screen for one last time. But when does Hacks season 5 episode 10 drop on HBO Max?

item.title: SpaceX's Starlink will soon provide in-flight Wi-Fi for American Airlines
item.description: Starlink is coming to (some of) American Airline.

item.title: MacBook Pro 14 M5, Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 et TV Mini LED TCL 98C6K : les meilleurs bons plans tech du mardi 26 mai 2026
item.description: Ce mardi 26 mai 2026, les bons plans du jour mettent à l’honneur trois équipements très convoités : un TV QD Mini LED géant à prix cassé, le MacBook Pro 14 M5 en promo et les Galaxy Buds 4 de Samsung à moins de 150 euros.

item.title: Internet Starts to Return in Iran After 3-Month Blackout
item.description: Some internet connectivity is returning in Iran after nearly 90 days offline, web monitoring groups say. But it isn’t clear if the reconnection is permanent.

item.title: Apple’s Fitbit Air-rivaling AI health coach is delayed, new report claims, and that’s bad news for fitness fans
item.description: Apple’s rumored AI health coach has been delayed and won’t appear at WWDC in June, a new report claims.

item.title: ‘Social media should be treated like tobacco’: health experts say the internet is just as bad as smoking for under-16s as UK government edges closer to introducing ban
item.description: Social media use has been compared to smoking by medical professionals as the UK government enters the final stages of its ban consultation.

item.title: Most of the best Memorial Day sales are still live: We found the top discounts on TVs, mattresses, MacBooks, and Ninja appliances
item.description: Memorial Day sales aren't over yet. Shop last-chance deals from Bose, Sony, Ruggable, TCL, Shark, Ninja, and so many more.

item.title: ‘Spotify Connect destroys Apple Music at this specific thing’: Apple Music fans still can’t believe the platform is behind on continuity features — but that’s not the only thing that’s getting under their skin
item.description: Apple Music users are still waiting for a playback continuity feature that matches Spotify Connect.

item.title: Vous ne branchez pas votre hybride ? BMW imagine une sanction inédite (et ça n’a rien d’écologique)
item.description: BMW envisage de restreindre les performances de ses hybrides rechargeables si leurs propriétaires ne branchent pas assez souvent leurs voitures. Derrière cette idée pour le moins radicale, se cache une logique avant tout comptable avant même d'éventuelles raisons écologiques.

item.title: Anthropics Claude Mythos, or a model like it, to get public release
item.description: Anthropic is developing guardrails to prepare its Mythos AI model for public release.

item.title: 7 Best Outdoor Security Cameras (2026) After Testing Dozens
item.description: These weatherproof outdoor security cams keep a watchful eye on your property while you get on with life. Our list includes battery-powered cameras that need no subscription.

item.title: Samsungs 85-inch Q7F QLED 4K TV is under $900 for the first time ever
item.description: The Samsung 85-inch Q7F QLED 4K TV is down to just $899.99 at Amazon for the first time. That's 40% off its list price.

item.title: Absolute Anonymity: This VPN allows cash payments and costs the same every month, forever
item.description: Simple, secure connections don't get better

item.title: Custom drone makers hit 453mph to (unofficially) break the record for fastest drone on earth — and hand-made sawtooth carbon fiber propellors made all the difference
item.description: Carbon fiber propeller blades have powered a custom drone to break a world speed record – but it hasn't been officially recognised.

item.title: Test du GMKtec NucBox K13 : le premier mini-PC Lunar Lake est aussi l’un des plus discrets
item.description: Avec le NucBox K13, GMKtec signe son premier mini-PC sous Intel Lunar Lake, et c'est aussi l'un des plus plats et silencieux du marché.
